content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory can be redesigned around a hierarchical episodic planning neural architecture, where curiosity-driven sampling of unlabeled data is framed as the agent exploring its own memory space to plan future learning queries instead of just solving external environment tasks. This creates a closed-loop active learning system where the agent prioritizes memory edits that reduce long-term planning uncertainty over individual immediate prediction accuracy gains.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
